visualizations.title: Anatomy of Division
visualizations.description: The parts of a division equation showing how a quantity is split.

steps.explanation: Dividend: The total quantity or number you want to divide.
Divisor: The number of equal groups or group size you are dividing by.
Quotient: The resulting number of items in each group (or number of groups).
Remainder: The leftover quantity that cannot be divided evenly.

visualizations.title: Sharing Model: 12 Divided by 3
visualizations.description: Visualizing sharing 12 items equally into 3 groups, resulting in 4 items per group.
